scope_note: QA Orbit Theorem Map Cert family. Falsifiable validator for exported QA orbit theorem-map JSON. The validator recomputes orbit-family labels over declared train/test moduli, recomputes exact multibase features using integer arithmetic, replays declared leaf paths, and compares recomputed train/test confusion matrices against the theorem-map declarations. It certifies only internal exactness of the exported theorem map for the declared finite orbit grids; it does not prove infinite-modulus generalization.
